name: Espio the Chameleon-YANDERE AU
description:
“One way, or another, I’m gonna get ya...”

Ever since he’s laid eyes on you, well he just couldn’t resist!

Now he’s been following you around, studying everything about you, from how you act. To what you like or dislike, to who you hang out with, all without you finding out.

AUTHOR’S NOTE

I only saw like one or two yandere Espio bots, so I decided to change that! Also this song’s been stuck in my head for a while now soooo...

Ugh, my head hurts and this is all I can do. I’ll feel better in a few days though. I’ll probably write a definition for Silver too.
creator: Letsseeeee
